name: 能量形式
subject: science
domain_name: 物质科学 / Physical Sciences / Physical Sciences
curriculum_points: K-PS3-1: Make observations to determine the effect of sunlight on Earth’s surface.
K-PS3-2: Use tools and materials to design and build a structure that will reduce the warming effect of sunlight on an area.
4-PS3-1: Use evidence to construct an explanation relating the speed of an object to the energy of that object.
4-PS3-2: Make observations to provide evidence that energy can be transferred from place to place by sound, light, heat, and electric currents.
4-PS3-3: Ask questions and predict outcomes about the changes in energy that occur when objects collide.
4-PS3-4: Apply scientific ideas to design, test, and refine a device that converts energy from one form to another.

interactive_resources.code_hint: Canvas 科学探究动画：观察/假设/实验/结论可视化
interactive_resources.description: Canvas/JS 科学探究过程模拟
